productInfo.name: EOS R6 Mark II (RF24-105mm f/4-7.1 IS STM)

sections.title: Promotion
sections.description: The EOS R6 Mark II gives you amazing 4K quality videos even at 60p through the 6K oversampling process that applies the debayer algorithm used in the CINEMA EOS system. Enjoy video quality with enhanced clarity and reduced noise compared to native 4K recordings.

sections.title: Impressive Details at 4K 60p
sections.description: The EOS R6 Mark II gives you amazing 4K quality videos even at 60p through the 6K oversampling process that applies the debayer algorithm used in the CINEMA EOS system. Enjoy video quality with enhanced clarity and reduced noise compared to native 4K recordings.

sections.title: 180p FHD
sections.description: Spruce up your storytelling with some dramatic slow-motion effects with the 180p Full High Definition (FHD) recording.

sections.title: Canon Log 3
sections.description: Well-liked among filmmakers for its excellent dynamic range, Canon Log 3 can showcase smooth gradation in high contrast, making it highly versatile with high editing tolerance during post-production.

sections.title: Steady & Smooth Videos
sections.description: Coordinated Control combines all three image-stabilising systems in the camera: 5-axis In-Body Image Stabilizer, Optical Image Stabilizer and Movie Digital Image Stabilizer.

sections.title: Pre-recording
sections.description: Almost never miss any unexpected moments again with the EOS R6 Mark II's Pre-recording function.

sections.title: Blazing Fast
sections.description: You can lock onto a subject in a blink of an eye with autofocus speed as fast as 0.03 seconds. Coupled with a continuous shooting speed of up to 40fps in electronic shutter and up to 12fps in mechanical shutter with AF/AE tracking, the EOS R6 Mark II can capture high-speed action with extremely high accuracy.

sections.title: High Dynamic Range (HDR)
sections.description: HDR mode lets you capture realistic images with a wider range of tonality, approx. 3000 nits. With Dynamic Range Priority, the camera takes 3 shots at different exposure levels, then combines them into 1 composite HDR image.

sections.title: Subject Detection
sections.description: Equipped with the EOS iTR AF X (Intelligent Tracking & Recognition Autofocus), the camera accurately detects and tracks the subjects while you focus on getting the best composition.

sections.title: Human Priority
sections.description: Be amazed by the camera’s ability to track the subject's body, head or eye as they move, even if they get obscured, with high accuracy.

sections.title: Auto Subject Detection
sections.description: If you cannot determine the kind of subjects you will be capturing, Auto Subject Detection will automatically detect and track subjects without switching to any AF priority modes.

sections.title: Connectivity
sections.description: With the Canon Camera Connect app, you can change settings, trigger your camera remotely, and even transfer videos and images to your smart devices. Connect the EOS R6 Mark II to your Android or iOS smart devices using a compatible USB-C cable or wirelessly via Wi-Fi (2.4GHz/5GHz) or Bluetooth Low Energy (LE).

sections.title: Design Excellence
sections.description: The layout of the buttons and switches has been redesigned for the convenience of those who take photos and videos. In addition, a dedicated lever to toggle between photo and video modes has been added for you to switch between the modes quickly without needing to use the mode dial.

sections.title: High Precision EVF
sections.description: A high-quality 0.5-inch OLED electronic viewfinder with approximately 3.69 million dots allows superb colour reproduction close to the sRGB colour space. With a refresh rate of up to 119.88 fps, viewing is exceptionally comfortable and smooth, even during shooting that requires fast panning.

sections.title: Dust- & Drip-Resistance
sections.description: Besides being dust- and drip-resistant, the EOS R6 Mark II is solidly built with a highly durable magnesium alloy chassis to withstand the elements.
